title: Dreamy Destination Ad Copy
scenario: Create an ad copy for a travel brochure promoting a luxurious resort in Bali. The copy should highlight the serene surroundings, exotic cuisine, and rejuvenating spa treatments. The tone should be inviting and seductive. Use a mix of descriptive adjectives and sensory details to transport the reader to the resort. The ad copy should be at least 75 words but no more than 150 words.
constraints: Must include at least two descriptive adjectives per sentence
Must use sensory details to describe the surroundings

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the ad copy convey a seductive and inviting tone?
Are there at least two descriptive adjectives per sentence?
Does the ad copy use sensory details to describe the surroundings?
Does the ad copy meet the specified constraints (voice, adjective usage, and sensory details)?
